creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I have a microphone at /dev/dsp6.2 which is a microphone-only device (not associated with speakers).

dsp6 isn't shown by:
> $ pacmd list-sources | grep dsp
> 	name: <oss_output.dsp0.monitor>
> 		device.description = "Monitor of /dev/dsp0"
> 	name: <oss_output.dsp1.monitor>
> 		device.description = "Monitor of /dev/dsp1"
> 	name: <oss_input.dsp2>
> 		device.string = "/dev/dsp2"
> 		device.description = "/dev/dsp2"
> 	name: <oss_output.dsp2.monitor>
> 		device.description = "Monitor of /dev/dsp2"
> 	name: <oss_input.dsp3>
> 		device.string = "/dev/dsp3"
> 		device.description = "/dev/dsp3"
> 	name: <oss_output.dsp3.monitor>
> 		device.description = "Monitor of /dev/dsp3"
> 	name: <oss_output.dsp4.monitor>
> 		device.description = "Monitor of /dev/dsp4"
> 	name: <oss_output.dsp5.monitor>
> 		device.description = "Monitor of /dev/dsp5"

pulseaudio-13.0
